'''Blizzard 4''', alternatively spelled '''Blizzard Four''', was an [[All Terrain Armored Transport]] which served as [[Colonel]] [[Starck]]'s [[walker]] during the [[Battle of Hoth]], under the command of [[General]] [[Maximilian Veers]], leader of [[Blizzard Force]].<ref name="AbEverything" /> The walker was destroyed when [[Luke Skywalker]] detonated a [[grenade]] inside Blizzard 4.<ref name="ESB" /><ref name="CL">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref>

{{Imp-stub}}
